'''鈭歱-s-r''' ('''kapasar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yawp|yawp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yawp|yawp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-s-r
|-
! Lemma
| kapasar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipasar|thipasar]] || [[word:jipasar|jipasar]] || [[word:shipasar|shipasar]] || [[word:kipasar|kipasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupasar|thuthupasar]] || [[word:jujupasar|jujupasar]] || [[word:shushupasar|shushupasar]] || [[word:kukupasar|kukupasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupasar|thupasar]] || [[word:jupasar|jupasar]] || [[word:shupasar|shupasar]] || [[word:kupasar|kupasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupasar|thupasar]] || [[word:jupasar|jupasar]] || [[word:shupasar|shupasar]] || [[word:kupasar|kupasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepasar|thepasar]] || [[word:jepasar|jepasar]] || [[word:shepasar|shepasar]] || [[word:kepasar|kepasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopasar|thothopasar]] || [[word:jojopasar|jojopasar]] || [[word:shoshopasar|shoshopasar]] || [[word:kokopasar|kokopasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopasar|thopasar]] || [[word:jopasar|jopasar]] || [[word:shopasar|shopasar]] || [[word:kopasar|kopasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopasar|thopasar]] || [[word:jopasar|jopasar]] || [[word:shopasar|shopasar]] || [[word:kopasar|kopasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pasar|th忙pasar]] || [[word:j忙pasar|j忙pasar]] || [[word:sh忙pasar|sh忙pasar]] || [[word:k忙pasar|k忙pasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapasar|thathapasar]] || [[word:jajapasar|jajapasar]] || [[word:shashapasar|shashapasar]] || [[word:kakapasar|kakapasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapasar|thapasar]] || [[word:japasar|japasar]] || [[word:shapasar|shapasar]] || [[word:kapasar|kapasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapasar|thapasar]] || [[word:japasar|japasar]] || [[word:shapasar|shapasar]] || [[word:kapasar|kapasar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapasar|shapasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapasar|goshapasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapasar|gokishapasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapasarn眉|shapasarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapasarnkn眉|goshapasarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasarn眉|gokishapasarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapasarsh毛|shapasarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapasarnksh毛|goshapasarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapasarsh毛|gokishapasarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasaro|shapasaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasarnkro|goshapasarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasaro|gokishapasaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasarmu|shapasarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasarnkmu|goshapasarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasarmu|gokishapasarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapasarsher|shapasarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapasarnksher|goshapasarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapasarsher|gokishapasarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapasarng|shapasarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapasarnkng|goshapasarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapasarng|gokishapasarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapasarya|shapasarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapasarnkya|goshapasarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapasarya|gokishapasarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapasaryam|shapasaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapasarnkyam|goshapasarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapasaryam|gokishapasaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasarn眉sh毛|shapasarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasarnkn眉sh毛|goshapasarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasarn眉sh毛|gokishapasarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasarn眉ro|shapasarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasarnkn眉ro|goshapasarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasarn眉ro|gokishapasarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasarn眉mu|shapasarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasarnkn眉mu|goshapasarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasarn眉mu|gokishapasarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasarsh毛n眉|shapasarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasarnksh毛n眉|goshapasarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasarsh毛n眉|gokishapasarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasarsh毛ro|shapasarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasarnksh毛ro|goshapasarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasarsh毛ro|gokishapasarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasarsh毛mu|shapasarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasarnksh毛mu|goshapasarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasarsh毛mu|gokishapasarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasaron眉|shapasaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasarnkron眉|goshapasarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasaron眉|gokishapasaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasarosh毛|shapasarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasarnkrosh毛|goshapasarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasarosh毛|gokishapasarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasaromu|shapasaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasarnkromu|goshapasarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasaromu|gokishapasaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasarmun眉|shapasarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasarnkmun眉|goshapasarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasarmun眉|gokishapasarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasarmush毛|shapasarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasarnkmush毛|goshapasarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasarmush毛|gokishapasarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasarmuro|shapasarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasarnkmuro|goshapasarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasarmuro|gokishapasarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
